design_philosophy: A high-speed, command-center POS for a fast-paced Greek takeaway 'Πεινώκιο'. Prioritizes extreme legibility, massive touch targets, and high-contrast cues. It uses deep obsidian backgrounds with stark white text and electric amber/orange for primary actions, stripping away all decorative elements to focus entirely on rapid order entry.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous inner padding but dense grids (p-4, p-6).
layout.global_structure: Two-panel horizontal split. Left: 70% width for categories and item grid. Right: 30% width fixed sidebar for the current order.

right_panel.order_sidebar: flex flex-col h-full bg-[#1A1A1A] border-l border-[#333333] p-6 sticky top-0

layout.touch_targets: All interactive elements (buttons, menu items) MUST have a minimum height of 64px (h-16) for fast PDA tapping. Menu items should be tall cards (h-32).

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B00] text-white hover:bg-[#FF8533] h-16 text-lg font-bold rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.category: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white border border-[#333333] hover:border-[#FF6B00] h-14 px-6 text-lg font-medium rounded-md
buttons.category_active: bg-[#FF6B00] text-white h-14 px-6 text-lg font-bold rounded-md

components.menu_item_card: flex flex-col justify-between p-4 bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#333333] hover:border-[#FF6B00] rounded-lg cursor-pointer h-32 transition-all active:scale-95

customization_modal.container: bg-[#0D0D0D] border border-[#333333] rounded-xl p-8 max-w-3xl w-full
customization_modal.option_toggle: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border border-[#333333] rounded-lg cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] data-[state=on]:border-[#FF6B00] data-[state=on]:bg-[#FF6B00]/10

components.order_item_row: flex justify-between items-start py-4 border-b border-[#333333] last:border-0
components.quantity_controls: flex items-center gap-4 bg-[#0D0D0D] rounded-md p-1
components.source_button: flex-1 py-3 text-center rounded text-sm font-bold data-[state=on]:bg-[#333333] data-[state=on]:text-white data-[state=off]:text-[#A3A3A3]

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on the #FF6B00 primary button. Ensure text on #1A1A1A meets 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.testing: All buttons, items, and toggles MUST use data-testid. Examples: data-testid='category-btn-orektika', data-testid='menu-item-pita', data-testid='order-submit-btn'.

logo_placeholder.description: Ambient dark restaurant background, useful for a subtle login/idle screen background overlay if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind, React Router, and Shadcn UI (button, dialog, input, select, popover, calendar, toast, table, chart).
Install date-fns for the analytics date range picker.
Create a responsive, touch-friendly POS layout. The UI must be strictly Dark Mode (#0D0D0D base).
DO NOT use generic shadow classes. Rely on 1px solid borders (#333333) for structural definition.
The left panel must contain horizontal wrapping pills for Categories (Ορεκτικά, Αλοιφές, Τεμάχια, Σάντουιτς, Μερίδες, Αναψυκτικά, Μπύρες/Ποτά).
When a category is selected, the grid updates. Items are large, highly tappable cards (min-h-[128px]).
Clicking a 'Σάντουιτς' item MUST open the Customization Modal with toggles for Bread (single), Extras (multi), Sauces (multi), and Double Meat (+1.50€).
The right panel is the Order Summary. It must show selected items, allow quantity +/- (which update the total), select source (Ταμείο/Τηλέφωνο/efood/Box), and have a massive Print/Checkout button.
Implement browser printing for the receipt (hide UI elements using @media print, format receipt using JetBrains Mono).
Build the Analytics view with Recharts. Include a Date Range picker (Από/Έως). Show Total Revenue, Total Orders, Sales by Source, and Popular Items.
Ensure Greek typography is legible (use Manrope for body, Outfit for headers).
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements for robust automated testing.
